description: City/source subset for the comparison; matches a subfolder under images/.
Filename of the left image shown in the pairwise comparison.
Filename of the right image shown in the pairwise comparison.
Pairwise label: -1 means left image perceived as safer, 0 means tie/no clear preference, +1 means right image perceived as safer.
True when both released left and right gaze-map files are available for the row.
Anonymized survey/session identifier. For eye-tracking rows this matches a curated source-session folder.
Left gaze-map filename retained for compatibility with earlier code. Prefer gaze_l_relpath for new analyses.
Right gaze-map filename retained for compatibility with earlier code. Prefer gaze_r_relpath for new analyses.
Original source eye-tracking flag before checking whether both released gaze-map files are present.
Release-relative path to the left image from the dataset root.
Release-relative path to the right image from the dataset root.
Release-relative path to the left fixation-derived gaze map, if available.
Release-relative path to the right fixation-derived gaze map, if available.
Release-relative path to the sanitized source session folder under eye_tracking_sources/sessions/.
Release-relative path to the trial screenshot used during the eye-tracking session, when the screenshot file is available.
